title: Nilavai Kondu Va Lyrics Vaali
stanzas:
<div>
Nilavai Kondu Va Lyrics Vaali

Nilavai kondu vaa
kattilil katti vai.
megam kondu vaa
meththai potuvai.

nilavai pidithaen
kattilil kattinen.
megam pidithaen
meththai virithaen.

kaayum sooriyanai
kadalukkul pootti vai.
iravu thodarnthida
indhiranai kaaval vai.

kaayum sooriyanai
kadalukku poottinen.
iravu thodarndhidum
indhiranai nambinen.

indru mudhal iravu
indru mudhal iravu..
ne en ilamaikku unavu.
indru mudhal iravu..
ne en ilamaikku unavu.

unnavaa unnai killavaa
illai allavaaa, nee vaaa

varavaa vandhu thodavaa
un aadaikkum viduthalai tharavaa
avasaram koodaathu
anumadhi tharum varai

podhuvaa naan ponnaa
nee sonnapadi kaetkum saadhu.
idhu pondra visiyathil
un pechu udhavaathu.

mella idaiyinai thoduvaayaa.
mella udaiyinai kalavaayaa.
naan thudikkaiyil
vedikkaiyil muthangal tharuvaayaa.

podhumaa adhu podhumaa
aasai theerumaa ...

maamaa en maamaa
indha nilavai oodhi anaipomaa
kaanaatha un kolam
kan kondu kaangindrathe

idhazhaal un idhazhaal
un vetkam thudaithu
viduvaayaa.
angaththil vetkangal
engendru solvaayaa

thaen engengu undu endru
poo vandukku sollaa vittaal
adhu thaan thaedi unnaamal
paerinbam vaaraadhu...

thunbamaa paerinbamaa
adhu vendumaa ammaa..

Nilavai kondu vaa
kattilil katti vai.
megam kondu vaa
meththai potuvai.

nilavai pidithaen
kattilil kattinen.
megam pidithaen
meththai virithaen.

kaayum sooriyanai
kadalukkul pootti vai.
iravu thodarnthida
indhiranai kaaval vai.

kaayum sooriyanai
kadalukku poottinen.
iravu thodarndhidum
indhiranai nambinen.

indru mudhal iravu
indru mudhal iravu..
ne en ilamaikku unavu.
indru mudhal iravu..
ne en ilamaikku unavu.

unnavaa unnai killavaa
illai allavaaa, nee vaaa

seo.title: Nilavai Kondu Va Lyrics Vaali
seo.description: Full Nilavai Kondu Va songs lyrics, Vaali Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Deva, Singer(s): Anuradha Sriram, Unnikrishnan.
seo.keywords: Vaali, Deva, Anuradha Sriram, Unnikrishnan, Nilavai Kondu Va full lyrics, Vaali songs lyrics, Nilavai Kondu Va lyrics snippets, Nilavai Kondu Va WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Nilavai Kondu Va lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, portraying a romantic connection between the characters.

What is the plot context of the movie Vaali?

Vaali revolves around a complex love triangle, showcasing themes of obsession and unrequited love.

Who are the singers of Nilavai Kondu Va?

The song features the melodious voices of Anuradha Sriram and Unnikrishnan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Nilavai Kondu Va was composed by Deva, known for his captivating melodies.

When was the song released?

The song was released on April 18, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Vaali, Nilavai Kondu Va serves as a poignant expression of love and desire, encapsulating the emotional turmoil faced by the characters. The soothing melody, combined with heartfelt lyrics, evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. This duet beautifully illustrates the complexities of love, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema. The collaboration between Anuradha Sriram and Unnikrishnan adds depth to the song, making it a timeless classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nilavai Kondu Va from the Vaali movie is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Anuradha Sriram and Unnikrishnan, this song is a perfect blend of emotion and melody, crafted by the talented music director Deva. Dive into the romantic vibes of this classic track that resonates with every heart.
stanzaMeanings: Come with the moon and tie it on the bed. Come with the clouds and place them on the pillow.
I have caught the moon and tied it on the bed. I have caught the clouds and spread them on the pillow.
Put the sun that shines in the sea. Guard the moon that continues through the night.
I have put the sun that shines in the sea. I believed in the moon that continues through the night.
From today evening to today evening.. you are the food for my hunger. From today evening.. you are the food for my hunger.
Aren't you my food, aren't you my life, come here.
Will you come and give freedom to your dance? Don't delay, until you give permission, don't come.
Generally, I will listen to what you say. In this matter, your words won't help.
Will you slowly touch me? Will you slowly take away my clothes? Will you give me jewels in the beginning of my worship?
Is that enough, is that enough, will the desire be fulfilled...
Oh my uncle, will we all run with this moon? Your beauty is what I am looking at.
Will your eyes, your eyes, be able to hide the shame? Will you say where the shame is?
If the honey is not there, will the flower come to tell? That is why, without you, happiness won't come...
Is it a burden, is it a name, is that necessary, mother..
Come with the moon and tie it on the bed. Come with the clouds and place them on the pillow.
I have caught the moon and tied it on the bed. I have caught the clouds and spread them on the pillow.
Put the sun that shines in the sea. Guard the moon that continues through the night.
I have put the sun that shines in the sea. I believed in the moon that continues through the night.
From today evening to today evening.. you are the food for my hunger. From today evening.. you are the food for my hunger.
Aren't you my food, aren't you my life, come here.
